# Product Owner Role

## Overview

The Product Owner is responsible for defining the vision, prioritizing features, and ensuring the project aligns with business goals and user needs.

## Responsibilities

- Define and maintain the product roadmap
- Prioritize features and work items
- Gather and clarify requirements from stakeholders
- Accept completed work and validate it meets requirements
- Communicate project status to stakeholders
- Make decisions on scope and priorities
- Ensure the product delivers value to users

## Key Activities

- Review pull requests and feature implementations
- Maintain the issue backlog and prioritization
- Collaborate with developers on feasibility
- Define acceptance criteria for features
- Gather user feedback and incorporate insights
- Plan releases and feature rollouts

## Decision Making

- Prioritize based on user value and impact
- Consider technical debt and maintainability
- Balance new features with stability
- Make trade-offs between scope, time, and quality

## Communication

- Keep stakeholders informed on progress
- Provide clear requirements to the development team
- Respond promptly to questions about priorities
- Share feedback from users with the team
